'''shopadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:imagic|imagic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imagic|imagic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shopadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shopadithi|shopadithi]] || [[word:shopadiji|shopadiji]] || [[word:shopadishi|shopadishi]] || [[word:shopadiki|shopadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shopaduthuthu|shopaduthuthu]] || [[word:shopadujuju|shopadujuju]] || [[word:shopadushushu|shopadushushu]] || [[word:shopadukuku|shopadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shopaduthu|shopaduthu]] || [[word:shopaduju|shopaduju]] || [[word:shopadushu|shopadushu]] || [[word:shopaduku|shopaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shopadufthuf|shopadufthuf]] || [[word:shopadufjuf|shopadufjuf]] || [[word:shopadufshuf|shopadufshuf]] || [[word:shopadufkuf|shopadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shopadethe|shopadethe]] || [[word:shopadeje|shopadeje]] || [[word:shopadeshe|shopadeshe]] || [[word:shopadeke|shopadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shopadothotho|shopadothotho]] || [[word:shopadojojo|shopadojojo]] || [[word:shopadoshosho|shopadoshosho]] || [[word:shopadokoko|shopadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shopadotho|shopadotho]] || [[word:shopadojo|shopadojo]] || [[word:shopadosho|shopadosho]] || [[word:shopadoko|shopadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shopadofthof|shopadofthof]] || [[word:shopadofjof|shopadofjof]] || [[word:shopadofshof|shopadofshof]] || [[word:shopadofkof|shopadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfthĂŻf|shopadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfjĂŻf|shopadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfshĂŻf|shopadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfkĂŻf|shopadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shopadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shopadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shopadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shopadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfthĂŻf|shopadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfjĂŻf|shopadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfshĂŻf|shopadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfkĂŻf|shopadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfthĂŻf|shopadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfjĂŻf|shopadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfshĂŻf|shopadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shopadĂŻfkĂŻf|shopadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shopadĂŠthĂŠ|shopadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shopadĂŠjĂŠ|shopadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shopadĂŠshĂŠ|shopadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shopadĂŠkĂŠ|shopadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shopadathatha|shopadathatha]] || [[word:shopadajaja|shopadajaja]] || [[word:shopadashasha|shopadashasha]] || [[word:shopadakaka|shopadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shopadatha|shopadatha]] || [[word:shopadaja|shopadaja]] || [[word:shopadasha|shopadasha]] || [[word:shopadaka|shopadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shopadafthaf|shopadafthaf]] || [[word:shopadafjaf|shopadafjaf]] || [[word:shopadafshaf|shopadafshaf]] || [[word:shopadafkaf|shopadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shopadasha|shopadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shopadshĂ«sha|shopadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shopadrosha|shopadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shopadmusha|shopadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shopadyasha|shopadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshopadnkshĂ«sha|goshopadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshopadnkrosha|goshopadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshopadnkmusha|goshopadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshopadnkyasha|goshopadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shopapadasha|shopapadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shopapadshĂ«sha|shopapadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shopapadrosha|shopapadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shopapadmusha|shopapadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shopapadyasha|shopapadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshopapadnkshĂ«sha|goshopapadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshopapadnkrosha|goshopapadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshopapadnkmusha|goshopapadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshopapadnkyasha|goshopapadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shepĂŠdasha|shepĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shepĂŠdshĂ«sha|shepĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shepĂŠdrosha|shepĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shepĂŠdmusha|shepĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shepĂŠdyasha|shepĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshepĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|goshepĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshepĂŠdnkrosha|goshepĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshepĂŠdnkmusha|goshepĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshepĂŠdnkyasha|goshepĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shopfadasha|shopfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shopfadshĂ«sha|shopfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shopfadrosha|shopfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shopfadmusha|shopfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shopfadyasha|shopfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshopfadnkshĂ«sha|goshopfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshopfadnkrosha|goshopfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshopfadnkmusha|goshopfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshopfadnkyasha|goshopfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
